Pediatric Cancer Family Support · Est. 2025

No family should face this alone.

When a child is diagnosed with cancer, everything changes instantly. Zuzu's Zone delivers essential support packages to parents and guardians at the hardest moment of their lives — so they can focus on what matters most.

Make a Donation Our Story

"Our mission is to provide the parents and guardians of newly diagnosed pediatric cancer patients with support packages filled with essentials — so they can focus on their child & their care plan."

Who We Are

A mission born from lived experience

"The purpose of Zuzu's Zone is to provide families with essential basic needs upon the confirmation of a childhood cancer diagnosis — offering comfort, support, and practical resources during a challenging time."

Zuzu's Zone is a nonprofit organization dedicated to easing the burden for families in the most overwhelming moment of their lives. We believe that parents and caregivers need support too — not just the child being treated.

We provide thoughtfully assembled support packages filled with essentials for that critical first hospital stay, so families can step into that room feeling prepared, seen, and cared for.

For families who must travel long distances to access pediatric cancer treatment, we may also be able to provide travel assistance. No family should have to choose between being there and making ends meet.

Support a Family
The Support Package

What's in every bag

🎒 In Every Bag

  • Folder with information
  • Onsite food/drink GC
  • DoorDash / GrubHub / UberEats GC
  • Blanket
  • Notebook & Pen
  • Cup or Water Bottle w/ Logo
  • Towel / Washcloth / Loofa
  • Zipper Pouch
  • Kleenex
  • Earplugs
  • Sleep Mask
  • Charger Box
  • Charging Cord

🧴 Hygiene Essentials

  • Toothbrush
  • Toothpaste
  • Deodorant
  • Sanitizer
  • Shampoo / Conditioner
  • Floss
  • Lotion
  • Comb / Brush
  • Chapstick

📋 Available Upon Request

  • Contact Case / Solution
  • Tampons / Pads
  • Shirts
  • Socks
  • Snacks
Our Story

How Zuzu's Zone began

When Tiarah's daughter — known to the world as Zuzu — was diagnosed with cancer, the family found themselves in the most terrifying and isolating experience imaginable. The doctors focused on Zuzu, as they should. But Tiarah was unprepared for the reality of living in that hospital — without the everyday essentials, without a guide, without someone thinking of her.

After Zuzu battled and beat cancer, Tiarah made a promise: no parent would walk into that hospital the way she did. Zuzu's Zone was born from that promise — a tribute to Zuzu's incredible fight and a lifeline for every family that comes after.

Founded in 2024, Zuzu's Zone has already been showing up at community events, building partnerships, and delivering bags directly to families in need. The name belongs to Zuzu. The mission belongs to every parent who has ever sat in that waiting room.

Tiarah N.

Founder & CEO

"I founded Zuzu's Zone after my daughter, known to the world as Zuzu, battled and beat cancer. We wanted to make a difference for the parents of kids who were just diagnosed with cancer."

In her daily life, Tiarah is a full-time community college student, a licensed in-home CNA with QMAP certification, and is actively building her own hospice care business — all while raising Zuzu and running this organization with her whole heart.

The Team

The people behind the mission

Tiarah N.

Founder & CEO

Founded Zuzu's Zone after her daughter beat cancer. CNA, student, and advocate dedicated to making sure no parent faces a diagnosis alone.

Ashle Johnson

Operations

Community-driven operations leader based in Denver, CO. With deep roots in nonprofit leadership and youth development, Ashle brings the organizational backbone to Zuzu's mission.

Demetria

Hospitality & Community Support

Currently working in hospitality and pursuing an associate's degree in medical assistance. Demetria has walked this journey personally — as a close friend of Tiarah's and someone who has faced similar family experiences, joining Zuzu's Zone was never a question. Compassionate, caring, and deeply committed to this cause.

Kelly Dunkin

Youth & Family Advocate

Passionate about helping youth in all circumstances build community support, self-confidence, and love through understanding and guidance. Committed to standing by children and families of all backgrounds — because a strong foundation of self starts at home.

Give Today

Your gift shows up at the hospital door

Every dollar you donate goes directly toward support packages and travel assistance for families navigating a pediatric cancer diagnosis. This is tangible, immediate help — a bag gets packed and delivered to a family in need.

Zuzu's Zone accepts donations securely through PayPal. You don't need a PayPal account — you can donate with any credit or debit card.
